PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.description: This Privacy Policy explains how HireScope collects, uses, and protects your personal data, as well as your rights when using our platform.

dataCollection.title: 1. Data Collection
items: We collect only the data necessary to provide our services: name, email, phone number, resume information, and other details you provide voluntarily.
Data may be provided when registering, applying for jobs, or subscribing to newsletters.
All data is used solely to provide services, connect candidates with recruiters, and send platform updates.

purposeOfProcessing.title: 2. Purpose of Data Processing
items: Connecting candidates with recruiters efficiently.
Providing analytics and insights to improve the hiring process.
Sending platform updates, newsletters, or promotions (only with user consent).
Compliance with applicable laws.

dataHandling.title: 3. Data Handling and Storage
items: All personal data is stored securely and only retained as long as necessary.
We do not share personal data with third parties except where required by law or to provide services (e.g., recruiters or payment processors).
Data retention periods are defined by internal policies and applicable law.

userRights.title: 4. User Rights
items: Users can access, correct, or request deletion of their personal data.
Users may unsubscribe from communications at any time by contacting <email>support@hirescope.com</email>.
Users can contact regulatory authorities if they believe their data rights are violated.

dataSecurity.title: 5. Data Security
dataSecurity.text: HireScope uses modern security measures, including encryption, secure data transfer protocols, and internal access controls, to protect your personal data.

changesToPolicy.title: 6. Changes to Privacy Policy
changesToPolicy.text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The latest version will be posted on the platform, and continued use constitutes acceptance of changes.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For questions about this Privacy Policy or data processing, contact us:
contact.address: Address: 123 Tech Street, San Francisco, CA, USA

TermsOfService.title: Terms of Service
TermsOfService.description: Welcome to HireScope! By accessing or using our platform, you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully to understand your rights and responsibilities.

useOfPlatform.title: 1. Use of the Platform
items: HireScope is designed to efficiently connect candidates and recruiters.
You may use the platform only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms.

accounts.title: 2. Accounts
items: Users are responsible for keeping their account credentials secure.
Sharing your account or unauthorized access is strictly prohibited.

userContent.title: 3. User Content
items: You retain ownership of your content, including resumes, profiles, or posts.
By using the platform, you grant HireScope permission to display and process your content to provide services.

prohibitedActions.title: 4. Prohibited Actions
items: No spamming, hacking, or other illegal activities are allowed.
Do not attempt to disrupt or harm the platform or other users.

termination.title: 5. Termination
items: HireScope may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
Termination does not affect obligations incurred prior to termination.

limitationOfLiability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.text: HireScope is provided 'as is' and is not liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from the use of the platform.

changesToTerms.title: 7. Changes to Terms
changesToTerms.text: We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of any changes.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: If you have any questions regarding these Terms, contact us:
contact.address: Address: 123 Tech Street, San Francisco, CA, USA
